formula: CO = (max(Long_Day, 0.01) * max(GI, 0.01) * max(FKF1, 0.01))^(1/3) * min(1/max(CDF1 * DELLA, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
FLC = (max(FRI, 0.01) * max(SVP, 0.01))^(1/2) * min(1/max(VIN3 * PRC2 * FCA * FPA * FLD * FVE * LD, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
SVP = 1.0 * min(1/max(Warm_Temperature * FCA * FVE * SOC1, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
PIF4 = max(Warm_Temperature, 0.01)^(1/1) * min(1/max(DELLA * GI, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply

FT = (max(CO, 0.01) * max(PIF4, 0.01) * max(FKF1, 0.01) * max(GI, 0.01) * max(Warm_Temperature, 0.01) * max(T6P, 0.01) * max(TPS1, 0.01))^(1/7) * min(1/max(FLC * SVP * CDF1, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
FUL = (max(FT, 0.01) * max(SPL9, 0.01) * max(SOC1, 0.01))^(1/3) * min(1/max(TFL1, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
SOC1 = (max(FT, 0.01) * max(FD, 0.01) * max(SPL9, 0.01))^(1/3) * min(1/max(FLC * SVP * DELLA * AP2 * TFL1, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
AP1 = (max(FT, 0.01) * max(FD, 0.01) * max(SOC1, 0.01) * max(LFY, 0.01) * max(SPL9, 0.01) * max(FUL, 0.01))^(1/6) * min(1/max(AP2 * TFL1, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
LFY = (max(FT, 0.01) * max(SOC1, 0.01) * max(AGL24, 0.01) * max(SPL9, 0.01))^(1/4) * min(1/max(DELLA * TFL1, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
Flowering_Time = (max(AP1, 0.01) * max(LFY, 0.01) * max(SOC1, 0.01) * max(FT, 0.01))^(1/4) * min(1/max(TFL1, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
